summary: Maeda has pivoted from a bearish short bias to explicitly stating that the crypto market bottom is in and prices are poised to move higher.
narrative: His latest analysis argues that the market is bottoming contrary to standard 4-year cycle theories, identifying STRC as a potential marginal buyer to propel BTC upward. This marks a significant shift from his previous heavy short positioning on ETH to an optimistic outlook on the next market phase.

tweets.text: 🎬 Closed my ETH Short. What’s Next for Crypto?
🎬 Why I’m Short $1.5M of ETH (It’s So Over)
